title: ASR Outdoor Folding Collapsible Waterproof Pet Travel Food Water Bowl with Clip

ASR Outdoor Folding Collapsible Waterproof Pet Travel Food Water Bowl with Clip

The ASR Outdoor Folding Collapsible Dog Cat Pet Travel Food Water Bowl is the perfect pet bowl for when you and your pets are on the move! Compact, lightweight, collapsible and easily foldable, the pet bowl is a must-have if you’re traveling, walking, running, camping or trekking with your furry friends.

The collapsible dog bowl is small and easy to pack with your dog toys, dog bed, dog food, dog treats, dog harness, dog collar, dog leash, dog crate and when you’re away from home. It features a convenient plastic latch for clipping on to king rings as an additional carrying option when hiking, walking or trekking.

Key Features

  • DESIGNED FOR TRAVEL: The ASR Outdoor Folding Collapsible Travel Water and Food Bowl is compact, portable, lightweight and won’t weigh you down when traveling, camping or away from home; the bowl features a convenient plastic latch for clipping on to king rings as another carry option
  • DURABLE LEAK PROOF MATERIAL: The interior fabric of the pet bowl is waterproof and leak proof plastic; made from 100% durable polyester, the dog bowl or cat bowl will stand up to lots of wear and tear and can hold your furry friends water or food for long periods of time
  • QUICK FOLDING AND EASY TO CLEAN: With a waterproof and leak proof interior, the pet bowl dries quickly and wipes clean once your dog or pet finishes eating or drinking; simply follow the included instructions for easy flat folding, storage and carrying
  • HOLDS FOOD AND WATER: The collapsible pet bowl is suitable for either water or dog food; the dog bowl or cat bowl can hold up to approximately four (4) cups of water or pet food
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.05lbs; Diameter: 6.5 inches; Depth: 2.5 inches; Exterior Material: 100% polyester; Interior Material: Waterproof and leak proof plastic; Purchase includes with folding directions

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASTPBRD1
  • UPC: 810058487254
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 6.5 in

What also makes this pet food and water bowl so great for traveling, is its low maintenance fabrication. The interior fabric of the pet bowl is made from a waterproof and leak proof plastic (exterior is 100% durable polyester), making it fast-drying very easy to wipe clean. Because of its durable fabrication, the dog bowl or cat bowl will stand up to lots of wear and tear and will hold pets water or food for long periods of time.

For folding the pet bowl when not in use, simply follow the included instructions for easy flat folding, storage and carrying. The collapsible pet bowl is suitable for either water or dog food and can hold up to approximately four (4) cups of water or pet food depending on the size of your pet.

The ASR Outdoor Folding Collapsible Dog Cat Pet Travel Food Water Bowl is suitable for any outdoor and wilderness adventure, road trip, camping trip or hiking your local trails! It will soon become a staple in your arsenal of travel pet supplies and pet accessories!
